message:
feat: add Anthropic SSE buffer overflow guard and Linear single-sided linkage conflict detection

Anthropic: add MAX_SSE_BUFFER_BYTES (16 MiB) guard preventing memory
exhaustion from malformed SSE streams that never produce an event
delimiter. Yields sse_buffer_overflow error and terminates the stream.

Linear: detect incomplete linkage conflicts when only one side is
provided but already claims a cross-reference (e.g., bead has
linear_issue_id but no Linear snapshot). Extract claims_remote_link()
and incomplete_linkage_conflict() helpers. Add integration test for
single-sided claimed linkage conflict.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
